response: With over 15 years of experience in medical transcription and scribing across diverse specialties including Orthopedics, Cardiology, and Neurology, I offer a proven track record of accuracy and efficiency. My expertise spans editing, quality analysis, and team supervision using platforms such as eClinicalWorks and Experity EMR, consistently exceeding productivity targets. I combine strong medical terminology knowledge with exceptional interpersonal skills to support physicians and enhance patient care workflows. My background includes successful leadership roles managing teams and streamlining customer relationship processes in high-volume environments. Proficient in MS Office and electronic health records with a typing speed of 70–80 WPM, I am a reliable multi-tasker dedicated to maintaining strict turnaround times. I am eager to bring my adaptability, leadership, and commitment to quality to your organization. Please find my detailed resume attached for your review. Thank you for considering my application for this professional opportunity.
